statement_format.description: The format type of statement. Allowed values: MT940, CSV, PDF.

date_start.description: The start date for making statements.

date_end.description: The end date for making statements.

regional_format.description: Required for CSV exports. The regional format of the statement, can be UK_US (comma-separated) or EUROPEAN (semicolon-separated).

include_attachment.description: Only for PDF exports. Includes attachments to mutations in the export, such as scanned receipts.
